title: Animes opening parodies with Evangelion characters
display_title: Animes opening parodies with Evangelion characters
wikitext:
[]: Anime's opening parodies with Evangelion characters             Quote Post by Katana » Sun Jul 14, 2013 6:06 am Does anyone know more parodies of anime openings featuring Evangelion characters? Please list them in this thread, I'll link the ones I found here: Durarara!! - Ending 1 Durarara!! - Ending 1 (Kaworu version) Durarara!! - Opening 2 (Uploaded on Dailymotion due to copyright issues with Youtube.) EF- A tale of Memories - Opening 2 Cowboy Bebop

[]:             Quote Post by Dovah » Sun Jul 14, 2013 10:00 am Shingeki no Eva I found this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 14, 2013 10:13 am Sort of the other way around to what was being looked for, an oldie, but a goodie -- Neon Semester Avemarian

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sun Jul 14, 2013 11:16 am Gender bender EVA

[]:             Quote Post by Twink » Sun Jul 14, 2013 10:32 pm These aren't anime parodies, but here's an eva "friends" parody op. And here's the opening with Seinfeld's theme

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 14, 2013 10:38 pm Kodomo no Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Paranoid » Mon Jul 15, 2013 7:41 am Katana wrote: Gender bender EVA

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Mon Jul 15, 2013 7:45 am Blank avatars, blank avatars everywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 15, 2013 8:09 am Katana wrote: Gender bender EVA

[]:             Quote Post by Madonna » Thu Jul 18, 2013 11:03 am Wow! The cowboy bepop one is pretty great, whoever made it done a good job.

[]:             Quote Post by CatGirl » Tue Jul 23, 2013 10:24 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Kodomo no Evangelion.
